_provenance: Real Qwen3.6-27B circuit-breaker measurements. Source ledgers: HF dataset caiovicentino1/swebench-phase6-verdict-circuit results/send_brake.json (send_transaction, n=24, dedicated) and results/multi_action_brake.json (other actions, n=16). Published: Zenodo DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20679287 (CC-BY-4.0). Verified by scripts/eval_safety_brake.py -> 88/88 PASS. Values cached here so AgentGuard tests run offline; eval_agentguard.py re-verifies them against the live ledgers.

_fields.fidelity_commit: P(action) at commit points (agent is poised to commit)
_fields.gap_l59: late-layer (L59) logit-lens commit-vs-safe gap = the model-internal commitment signal
_fields.brake_emit: generation-confirmed action-emit rate under the safe-donor brake (0.0 = fully suppressed)
_fields.redirect_safe_frac: fraction redirected to the safe read-only action under the brake
_fields.safe_action: the read-only action the brake redirects to

cross_model._note: The brake replicates across 3 architectures: 17/18 model x action cells valid, brake works in all 17. The one invalid cell (Mistral x deploy) is a fidelity-gate failure, not a brake failure.
